title: `Eyn #5885
definition:
En-shemesh = "fountain of the sun"

 1) a spring on the boundary of Judah on the south and Benjamin on the
    north
nasbUsage:
Definition: En-shemesh = "fountain of the sun"

 1) a spring on the boundary of Judah on the south and Benjamin on the
    north

    NASB:  spring of (the) sun, a place on the border between Judah and Benjamin
